3191610.name: Rampage Rowing
3191610.description: This game is a thrilling racing adventure that pits four characters against each other in a fast-paced competition. Players can choose between racing against AI opponents or teaming up with friends. At the start, select your vehicle from a range of car models and pick one of several scenic tracks. Each race consists of three laps around the circuit, with the first player to cross the finish line declared the winner. Utilize the spacebar to accelerate and the left and right arrow keys to steer your car through twists and turns. The pixel art style adds a charming retro feel, while the sound of engines revving and tires screeching immerses you in the action. Ready for a high-speed challenge?
